/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver/libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver/msg/_velinfo_s.c.o CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/c1_driver/msg/_velquery_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/doanh/atlas_c1/build/c1_driver:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libc1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
